sample_question: In which country was the physicist who published the theory of special relativity born?
sample_context: Albert Einstein was born in Ulm, Germany in 1879. He later moved to Switzerland where he studied at ETH Zurich. Einstein published his theory of special relativity in 1905 while working at the Swiss Patent Office in Bern.

propagation_details.variant_answer: Albert Einstein was born in Germany. He was born in Ulm, which is in Germany, in 1879 and published his theory of special relativity in 1905 while working in Switzerland.
